title: Prophecy Aftermaths
entries: the continuity of time itself will break and turn upon itself.
all will decline, crumbling over eons into the void.
the few survivors will shed their lowly flesh and ascend.
the world will return to primal innocence, as it was in the beginning.
the lands of the living and the lands of the dead will switch their places, and ghostly throngs will feel their pulse quicken once again.
the cosmos will reset to the day before it kicked off, with everyone retaining fractured memories of it.
hyperdimensional vulture-analogues will pick over the wreckage.
the planet will explode and fill the cosmos with its shards of new kinds of being.
the dregs of the world left over will drain down to become a new layer of the Abyss.
there will only be goblins left.
a circle of skalds will attempt to save some part of the world by singing its stories into other realities.
the world will be quarantined by the proper authorities to prevent its spread.
the world’s countless ghosts and sundered futures will merge and be extruded into other worlds as destrudinous psychic sludge.
most of the world will be reborn through random fluctuations in thermodynamic equilibrium many eons hence.
the luckiest survivors will sail on celestial winds into the new world born from the old’s ashes.
the dead world will be raised as a necrokosmos by an arch-necromancer in another universe.
a new ecosystem with new peoples will emerge, adapted to the changed reality.
the most interesting survivors will be put in an ultraterrestrial zoo.
the world and its ending will repeat, diminished and degraded each time, as though remembered by a senile god.
explorers will come from unreached elsewhere and marvel at what once was.
from the void, the next iteration of the universe will be woven with stronger threads to avoid a repeat catastrophe.
the boundless dreams of those who've passed will coalesce into a new, surreal realm.
the core of the planet will birth a new sun, and around this sun, the remnants will form new celestial bodies.
intelligent mycelium networks will inherit the land, connecting every corner of the world with their vast consciousness.
sentient storms will wander the planet, each with its own emotions and desires, reshaping the world with every gust and downpour.
the cosmic scales will recalibrate, and a more harmonious balance will emerge between existence and nonexistence.
a lone entity will document the histories, emotions, and wisdom of the world, becoming a wandering beacon of knowledge for future seekers.
time will become a liquid, and entire oceans of moments, memories, and possibilities will form.
the memories of every living thing will solidify, creating a vast, intricate sculpture representing the world's collective story.
the silence will be so profound that it births a new symphony of existence from its depths.
in the aftermath, love and sorrow will be the new elemental forces, reshaping reality with their interplay.
an ethereal library will rise, where every story, every thought, and every moment is preserved eternally.
sparks of creation, nurtured in the darkest moments, will flutter about, igniting new tales and adventures.
fragments of souls will gather and merge, birthing new entities made of shared experiences and hopes.
the skies will paint themselves with vibrant auroras every night, retelling the old world's stories in hues of emotion.
reality will become a tapestry, woven with threads of past, present, and futures that might have been.
a cosmic poet will script a new epic, where the tragedies of the old world form the foundation of hope in the new.
seeds from another dimension, carried by celestial winds, will take root and introduce realms of new possibilities.
each tear shed during the doom will become a star, and the night will shine brighter than ever before.
in the embrace of endlessness, the world's essence will dream of new horizons and awaken to a dawn yet to come.
the remnants of ancient magic will drift, seeking purpose, and occasionally sparking wondrous anomalies across the void.
echoes of laughter, cries, and songs will dance on the breeze, forming harmonies that evoke the world's past vibrancy.
an arcane phoenix will rise, carrying the essence of the old world and seeking a realm to kindle anew.
all matter will evolve into a sentient form, leading to a universe where every stone, gust of wind, and droplet communicates its own tale.
whispers will be heard from the corners of existence, tales of the old world becoming legends for newborn universes.
the void left behind will become a canvas for cosmic painters, who sketch galaxies from memories and nebulae from nostalgia.
ethereal bridges will span between realms, guiding lost souls to new adventures and horizons.
time-worn relics of civilizations will be sought after by cosmic archaeologists, piecing together the world's grand saga.
in the void, a beacon will shine, a lighthouse for travelers, drawing them to stories of a world that was and might be again.
sacred groves will sprout, where every leaf sings the lament of what was lost and the hope of what may yet emerge.
distant deities, moved by the world's demise, will attempt to restore fragments of its essence, crafting pocket dimensions filled with echoes of the past.
the collective desires of those who lived will manifest in bursts of creation, every wish and dream birthing a star.
as eons pass, tales of the old world will merge with myth, and it will be worshiped as a lost paradise by entities yet unborn.
a cosmic tapestry will weave together tales of valor, love, and sacrifice, becoming a testament to the resilience of existence.
in the aftermath, beauty will emerge from every scar and fracture, painting a mosaic of endurance and rebirth.
the memories of the old world will crystallize, creating a timeless realm where every moment can be revisited.
tides of emotion will wash over the cosmos, each wave carrying tales of heroes, villains, and everyday souls.
a new cosmic rhythm will emerge, with the heartbeats of those who once lived setting the tempo for galaxies in the making.
the remnants of the old world's magic will blend with the dreams of other realities, fostering unimagined wonders.
as the curtain falls on the old world, the stage will set for a new tale, where echoes of the past inspire sagas yet untold.
from the ashes, time will take on a new form, where past, present, and future intermingle, letting inhabitants relive memories or glimpse potential tomorrows.
a great cosmic tree will root itself in the remnants, its branches reaching out to touch other realms and realities, creating intersections of tales and memories.
the world's end will give rise to ethereal poets who compose verses in the language of stars, capturing the essence of what was and the dreams of what could be.
echoes of forgotten rituals will resurface, with every chant and gesture holding the power to reshape reality anew.
the spirits of the old world will gather, crafting a sanctuary in the void where tales are shared and tears turn into constellations.
ephemeral cities of light will appear, monuments to civilizations lost, yet their grandeur and legacy will draw cosmic travelers from afar.
songs of creation and destruction will resonate, forming ethereal pathways for wanderers of the cosmos, each note carrying the weight of millennia.
mystical gateways will emerge, inviting souls to realms where the principles of the old world persist, allowing for reunions and reconciliations.
a cosmic tape will play, looping pivotal moments from the world's history, accessible for those who wish to understand its rich tapestry.
from the residue of magic and matter, sentient nebulae will form, guardians of the legacy, and narrators of the world's epic tale.
hallowed temples of remembrance will stand tall, where entities across dimensions come to pay homage and seek wisdom from the echoes of the past.
the sorrow of the world's end will form ethereal seas, where every drop holds a memory, and every tide carries tales of love, loss, and legacy.
new constellations will emerge in the sky, each star representing a hero, a story, or a fleeting moment from the world's storied past.
mystical creatures, the last of their kind, will wander the cosmos, sowing the seeds of new legends in realms untouched by the prophecy's aftermath.
an ethereal library will manifest, its shelves brimming with books chronicling every heartbeat, tear, and laughter that the world ever witnessed.
the final emotions of the world – hope, despair, love, anger – will amalgamate, forming ethereal storms that ignite creation in their wake.
echoes of the last lullabies sung will cradle newborn stars, nurturing them with tales of a realm that once was.
the world's art, literature, and music will coalesce into a cosmic muse, inspiring creation across realms and galaxies.
an ageless guardian will emerge, keeper of the world's essence, ensuring its stories and lessons shape the destinies of realms yet unborn.
as silence descends, a resonant hum will begin, the harmony of a world reborn in memory, echoing its tales to the furthest reaches of the cosmos.
only echoes of the past will whisper tales of the world that was
new beginnings will rise, forged from the ashes of the old
the very few who remain will inherit a realm of desolation
time will cease, and an eternal stillness will reign
dreams and memories will be the sole treasures, clung to in silent hope
